description: Use the test_driven optimizer to improve the complaint-generator intake questioning phase. Target files: adversarial_harness/complainant.py. Phase goal: Improve complainant and mediator questioning so intake exits with stronger factual, evidentiary, and anchor coverage. Recommended actions: Ask the complainant to walk step-by-step through protected activity, response, and adverse action so causation can be modeled directly.. Weak complaint types to generalize for: housing_discrimination, hacc_research_engine. Weak evidence modalities to improve: policy_document, file_evidence. Intake targets: claim_elements, causation_sequence, chronology. Legal elements to probe: adverse_action, context_or_reason. Focus only on mediator/mediator.py. Target symbols: build_inquiry_gap_context.

+	    priority_terms: List[str] = []
+	    priority_term_lookup = set()

+	    chronology_priority_hints = self._extract_document_chronology_priority_hints(intake_case_file, claim_support_packets, adversarial_summary, self.phase_manager.get_phase_data(ComplaintPhase.INTAKE, 'workflow_optimization_guidance') or {}, self.phase_manager.get_phase_data(ComplaintPhase.INTAKE, 'claim_support_temporal_handoff') or {}, self.phase_manager.get_phase_data(ComplaintPhase.INTAKE, 'claim_reasoning_review') or {}, self.phase_manager.get_phase_data(ComplaintPhase.EVIDENCE, 'workflow_optimization_guidance') or {}, self.phase_manager.get_phase_data(ComplaintPhase.EVIDENCE, 'claim_support_temporal_handoff') or {}, self.phase_manager.get_phase_data(ComplaintPhase.EVIDENCE, 'claim_reasoning_review') or {})
+
+	    def _normalize_items(values: Any) -> List[str]:
+	        if isinstance(values, (list, tuple, set)):
+	            raw_values = list(values)
+	        elif values is None:
+	            raw_values = []
+	        else:
+	            raw_values = [values]
+	        normalized: List[str] = []
+	        seen = set()
+	        for value in raw_values:
+	            text = str(value or '').strip().lower()
+	            if not text or text in seen:
+	                continue
+	            seen.add(text)
+	            normalized.append(text)
+	        return normalized
+
+	    def _add_priority_term(value: Any) -> None:
+	        text = str(value or '').strip()
+	        if not text:
+	            return
+	        lowered = text.lower()
+	        if lowered in priority_term_lookup:
+	            return
+	        priority_term_lookup.add(lowered)
+	        priority_terms.append(text)
+	    expected_objectives = _normalize_items(adversarial_summary.get('expected_objectives') if isinstance(adversarial_summary, dict) else [])
+	    covered_objectives = _normalize_items(adversarial_summary.get('covered_objectives') if isinstance(adversarial_summary, dict) else [])
+	    uncovered_objectives = _normalize_items(adversarial_summary.get('uncovered_objectives') if isinstance(adversarial_summary, dict) else [])
+	    default_objectives = ['anchor_appeal_rights', 'anchor_grievance_hearing', 'anchor_selection_criteria', 'claim_elements', 'causation_sequence', 'chronology', 'hearing_request_timing', 'adverse_action', 'context_or_reason']
+	    for objective in default_objectives:
+	        if objective not in expected_objectives:
+	            expected_objectives.append(objective)
+	    for objective in _normalize_items(chronology_priority_hints.get('objectives')):
+	        if objective not in expected_objectives:
+	            expected_objectives.append(objective)
+	        if objective not in covered_objectives and objective not in uncovered_objectives:
+	            uncovered_objectives.append(objective)
+	    if bool(chronology_priority_hints.get('needs_chronology_closure')):
+	        for objective in ('chronology', 'causation_sequence', 'hearing_request_timing'):
+	            if objective not in expected_objectives:
+	                expected_objectives.append(objective)
+	            if objective not in covered_objectives and objective not in uncovered_objectives:
+	                uncovered_objectives.append(objective)
+	    if bool(chronology_priority_hints.get('needs_decision_document_precision')):
+	        for objective in ('documents', 'response_dates', 'context_or_reason'):
+	            if objective not in expected_objectives:
+	                expected_objectives.append(objective)
+	            if objective not in covered_objectives and objective not in uncovered_objectives:
+	                uncovered_objectives.append(objective)
+	    for objective in expected_objectives:
+	        if objective not in covered_objectives and objective not in uncovered_objectives:
+	            uncovered_objectives.append(objective)
+	    weak_modalities = set()
+	    weak_claim_types: List[str] = []
+	    for claim in intake_case_file.get('candidate_claims', []) if isinstance(intake_case_file, dict) else []:
+	        if not isinstance(claim, dict):
+	            continue
+	        claim_type = str(claim.get('claim_type') or '').strip().lower()
+	        if claim_type in {'housing_discrimination', 'hacc_research_engine'} and claim_type not in weak_claim_types:
+	            weak_claim_types.append(claim_type)
+	    for claim_packet in claim_support_packets.values() if isinstance(claim_support_packets, dict) else []:
+	        if not isinstance(claim_packet, dict):
+	            continue
+	        claim_type = str(claim_packet.get('claim_type') or '').strip().lower()
+	        if claim_type in {'housing_discrimination', 'hacc_research_engine'} and claim_type not in weak_claim_types:
+	            weak_claim_types.append(claim_type)
+	        for element in claim_packet.get('elements', []) or []:
+	            if not isinstance(element, dict):
+	                continue
+	            element_status = str(element.get('support_status') or '').strip().lower()
+	            element_label = str(element.get('element_label') or '').strip()
+	            element_id = str(element.get('element_id') or '').strip()
+	            element_signal = f'{element_label} {element_id}'.strip().lower()
+	            for key in ('evidence_classes', 'recommended_evidence', 'recommended_evidence_types', 'missing_evidence_modalities'):
+	                values = element.get(key)
+	                items = values if isinstance(values, list) else [values]
+	                for value in items:
+	                    normalized = str(value or '').strip().lower()
+	                    if normalized in {'policy_document', 'file_evidence'}:
+	                        weak_modalities.add(normalized)
+	            if element_status == 'supported':
+	                continue
+	            for value in (element_label, element_id, claim_packet.get('claim_type')):
+	                _add_priority_term(value)
+	            if any((token in element_signal for token in ('adverse', 'denial', 'termination', 'eviction', 'discipline'))):
+	                if 'adverse_action' not in covered_objectives and 'adverse_action' not in uncovered_objectives:
+	                    uncovered_objectives.append('adverse_action')
+	            if any((token in element_signal for token in ('reason', 'context', 'pretext', 'justification', 'basis'))):
+	                if 'context_or_reason' not in covered_objectives and 'context_or_reason' not in uncovered_objectives:
+	                    uncovered_objectives.append('context_or_reason')
+	            if any((token in element_signal for token in ('causation', 'retaliation', 'protected activity', 'timeline', 'sequence'))):
+	                if 'causation_sequence' not in covered_objectives and 'causation_sequence' not in uncovered_objectives:
+	                    uncovered_objectives.append('causation_sequence')
+	            if any((token in element_signal for token in ('date', 'timing', 'chronology', 'when'))):
+	                if 'chronology' not in covered_objectives and 'chronology' not in uncovered_objectives:
+	                    uncovered_objectives.append('chronology')
+	    objective_priority = ['claim_elements', 'causation_sequence', 'chronology', 'adverse_action', 'context_or_reason', 'anchor_appeal_rights', 'anchor_grievance_hearing', 'anchor_selection_criteria', 'hearing_request_timing', 'response_dates', 'documents', 'timeline', 'exact_dates']
+	    ordered_uncovered = [objective for objective in objective_priority if objective in uncovered_objectives]
